purpose: Run non-destructive Systems Hub security exposure reviews through the restricted Pi/DeepSeek runtime.
boundaries: No secrets may be exposed in prompts or reports.
No production exploitation or third-party testing.
No credential rotation, dependency changes, auth/RLS/payment/DNS changes, deploys, posts, outreach, or payments.
Outputs must use sanitized evidence only.
approval_source: Marco approved completion of the Systems Hub OS v2 Pi/DeepSeek migration and previously approved every-three-days security review scheduling.
